narration: What if I told you your cells have a ticking clock?
visual_description: Hook visual: What if I told you your cells have a ticking clock?
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: What if I told you your cells have a ticking clock?
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: What if I told you your cells have a ticking clock?

narration: Meet telomeres — the protective caps at the ends of your chromosomes.
visual_description: Context visual: Meet telomeres — the protective caps at the ends of your chromosomes.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Meet telomeres — the protective caps at the ends of your chromosomes.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Meet telomeres — the protective caps at the ends of your chromosomes.

narration: Every time a cell divides, these caps wear down, shortening your lifespan.
visual_description: Escalation visual: Every time a cell divides, these caps wear down, shortening your lifespan.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: Every time a cell divides, these caps wear down, shortening your lifespan.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: Every time a cell divides, these caps wear down, shortening your lifespan.

narration: Telomerase is an enzyme that can rebuild these caps, but it’s not a cure-all.
visual_description: Evidence visual: Telomerase is an enzyme that can rebuild these caps, but it’s not a cure-all.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: Telomerase is an enzyme that can rebuild these caps, but it’s not a cure-all.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: Telomerase is an enzyme that can rebuild these caps, but it’s not a cure-all.

narration: Understanding telomeres gives us a glimpse into the biology of aging.
visual_description: Payoff visual: Understanding telomeres gives us a glimpse into the biology of aging.
